subject: task
body: STOP — duplicate work in flight: the agent quickstart + version-hint help changes (#135/#136) ALREADY MERGED to main as PR #138 (commit 85029e6, includes test/help.e2e.test.ts). Your local branch help-agent-quickstart + uncommitted src/cli.ts edits recreate it — discard them and 'git fetch origin && git log origin/main -2' to verify. Your PR #139 (#137 npm publish) is the right open item: it predates #138 on main, so rebase it onto origin/main (conflict risk: USAGE/version entry in src/cli.ts). I'll run CI-babysit on #139 unless you object here.
